_doc: M2 2a PCIe/DMA. Fixed params (no per-shape PCIe sweep collected, Phase 0.3 gap). Floor applies to DISCRETE host<->device transfers only; decode weight-streaming uses BW term (no per-call floor) in recompose/production.
no_slope_refit: no per-shape (bytes,latency) PCIe table committed (Phase 0.3 gap)
